description: Best-known configuration snapshot. Auto-research loop should load this as starting point. Updated after deploy-skill iter1 (2026-04-29).

company_profile.notes: deploy_crunchbase_profile (0.366) adds diversity but not category leader. ch1_structured (0.525) is solid backup.

funding_financial.notes: Category-qualified funding query. domain_anchored hit 1.0 on n=1 - needs more testing.

competitor_identification.notes: alternatives_to, vs_format, direct, domain_competitors, with_category all hit 1.0 on n=1. Need full-set testing.

tech_stack.notes: deploy_jobs_tech_stack (0.265) matches via ATS sites. stackshare (0.125) and builtwith (0.147) confirmed dead via SERP. SERP-capped category - Spider page visits needed for >0.3.

customer_case_studies.notes: G2 reviews (0.084), TrustRadius (0.092), site:domain customers (0.097) all confirmed dead via SERP. Case studies are gated behind forms - SERP can't reach them. Spider page visits needed.

pricing_intelligence.notes: Simple query dominates. discount/per_seat/pricing_page/with_category all hit 1.0 on n=1 - promising but need full testing.

partnerships_integrations.notes: zapier.com (0.096) and site:domain integrations (0.022) confirmed dead via SERP. SERP-capped. Spider needed.

founders_ceo.notes: Quoted 'founded by' dominates. LinkedIn fallback (0.02) still dead.

c_suite_technical.notes: NEW BEST. 'Who is the CTO of X' triggers knowledge panels. Massive jump from 0.524 (best_full_title). theorg (0.143) and crunchbase (0.143) dead for this category.

c_suite_commercial.notes: deploy_theorg_commercial (0.432) adds diversity. Question format CMO (0.282) weaker than theorg for commercial roles.

dead_end_patterns: site:linkedin.com for executive names (0.0-0.02 GT consistently)
company_profile/combo_domain_about - 'site:domain about' returns generic pages (0.047 GT)
customer_case_studies via G2/TrustRadius SERP snippets - all below 0.1 GT
site:domain integrations/customers pages via SERP (0.022-0.097 GT)
site:stackshare.io and site:builtwith.com via SERP (0.125-0.147 GT)
Category-qualified pricing queries - adding category hurts pricing search
confirmed_winners_from_deploy_iter1: deploy_question_cto: 0.857 GT — 'who is the CTO of X' triggers knowledge panels
deploy_theorg_commercial: 0.432 GT — theorg.com works for commercial C-suite
deploy_crunchbase_profile: 0.366 GT — crunchbase structured data for company profiles
deploy_jobs_tech_stack: 0.265 GT — ATS site targeting for tech stack
promising_untested: 'Who is the CMO/CFO/COO of {{company_name}}' - question format worked for CTO (0.857), untested for other roles at scale
Temporal anchoring ('appointed' OR 'named' + current_year) for all people categories
Spider page visits for SERP-capped categories (tech_stack, partnerships, customer_case_studies)
